content: Phase 3: Backend - extend schema (gst_number, industry, discovery_sources, discovery_source_runs, enrichment_queue)
Phase 3: Backend - formalize BusinessDiscoveryProvider interface + 7 providers
Phase 3: Backend - pipeline v2 (dedup by GST/website/phone/name+pincode), geo intelligence step, enrichment queue
Phase 3: Backend - admin controls + health dashboard endpoints
Phase 3: Backend - 10k synthetic seed (Mumbai/Thane/Navi Mumbai, 6 industries) without AI
Phase 3: Backend - refactor dashboard/reports aggregations to SQL (perf for 10k)
Phase 3: Frontend - new Discovery page (health + provider cards + admin controls + logs)
